message:
feat(search): durability corruption resilience, NaN-safe conformal state, feedback poison recovery, expanded storage pipeline and two-tier index

Durability (file_protector, fsvi_protector):
- Distinguish bit-rot vs truncation in erasure recovery: skip source
  symbols when CRC fails but length matches (avoids feeding corrupted
  data to the codec and prevents OOM on large files)
- Remove redundant retry-with-repair-only fallback path, simplifying
  the recovery flow
- Parallel refactoring in fsvi_protector for consistency

Fusion (conformal, feedback):
- Guard against NaN alpha/gamma from deserialized state in adaptive
  conformal calibration; compute new_alpha into a local before mutation
  so state is preserved on error (bd-3gi9)
- Feedback module: recover from poisoned RwLock on both read and write
  paths instead of propagating panics; consolidate lock acquisition
  into helper methods

Index (hnsw, mrl, two_tier, wal, search, lib):
- HNSW: configurable ef_construction and distance metric parameters
- MRL: simplify truncation logic, reduce allocations
- Two-tier: major expansion with batch upsert, WAL merge improvements,
  configurable candidate over-fetch, and soft-delete filtering
- WAL: expanded merge strategies and dot-product scoring
- Search: additional score normalization entry point

FSFS (watcher, orchestration, runtime, lexical_pipeline):
- Watcher: robust inotify event coalescing with configurable debounce,
  recursive directory watching, and broken symlink tolerance
- Orchestration: refined shard coordination flow
- Runtime/lexical_pipeline: pipeline stage configuration improvements

Lexical, rerank, storage, embed:
- Lexical tokenizer: refined token boundary detection and stemming
- Rerank: new score calibration helpers
- Storage pipeline: major expansion (+264 lines) with batch ingestion,
  compaction scheduling, and segment merge orchestration
- Model cache: improved eviction policy

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
